edits.contents: [{"type":"text","text":"Young-repo promotion threshold smoke. No promotion history — bootstrap N = 3. Borderline scenario scores 4 → tagged.\n"}]

@adw-512 @adw-threshold-smoke
Feature: Borderline threshold scenario

  @adw-512
  Scenario: A borderline scenario scoring above bootstrap threshold
    Given the mock GitHub API is configured to accept issue comments
    When the "promotion-sweep" orchestrator is invoked with adwId "promotion-threshold-smoke-512" and issue 512
    Then the orchestrator subprocess exited 0
    And the mock GitHub API recorded a comment on issue 512
